response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with a strong focus on web and embedded systems. However, his C++ experience is limited to early career roles (National Instruments, 2014-2015) and lacks recent or high-performance system experience. His exposure to industrial automation, cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), or cloud platforms is minimal, which are critical for this role. His strengths lie in full-stack development and architecture, but the core C++ and industrial cybersecurity competencies are insufficient.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills with a focus on quality and testability (TDD, CI/CD)
Experience with real-time systems, networking, and high-performance applications (e.g., Dlang, low-latency services)
Proven ability to architect and deliver scalable solutions (e.g., Geo-Data platform, investment platform)
concerns: Limited C++ experience in the last 8+ years; no recent high-performance or industrial automation context
No demonstrated expertise in industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or secure development lifecycle
Lack of cloud platform experience (Azure) and industrial protocol knowledge (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, etc.)

key_factors.factor: Experience with industrial automation protocols and cloud platforms
